nodes.name: Heleia
nodes.summary: Heleia（Heleia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Javan heleia、Grey-hooded heleia、Pygmy heleia等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi heleia
nodes.summary: The Sulawesi heleia (Heleia squamiceps), also known as the streaky-headed white-eye and streak-headed ibon, is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
